screen.graffiti.title: Graffiti Editor
tooltip.graffiti.culling: Hides graffiti that is not in your field of view to improve FPS.
jei.graffiti.description:
Spray paint on any block face!

§7Right-click§r on a block face to paint (smooth, no cooldown).
Press §7C§r to open the color editor (HSB, HEX, brush size).
Hold §7Ctrl§r + §7mouse scroll§r or §7LEFT/RIGHT arrows§r to switch tools: Pencil, Eraser, Fill, Color Picker.

Graffiti syncs across players and persists on disk.
jei.graffiti.brush.description:
Clean graffiti from block surfaces!

§7Right-click§r on graffiti while holding the brush to clean a §7circular 6×6 pixel area§r.
Takes §78 strokes§r to fully remove a pixel (reduces opacity slowly).

§6Wet Brush:§r Drop the brush in water for §72 seconds§r to turn it into a Wet Brush (cleans in §72 strokes§r).
Craft a Wet Brush by combining with a Water Bucket.
Smelt a Wet Brush in a furnace to dry it back to a normal Brush.
jei.graffiti.wet_brush.description:
An effective graffiti cleaner!

§7Right-click§r on graffiti to clean a §7circular 6×6 pixel area§r in just §72 strokes§r.

§6Obtaining:§r
• Drop a §7Brush§r in water for §72 seconds§r
• Craft a Brush with a Water Bucket

§6Drying:§r Smelt in a furnace to turn back into a normal Brush.

Cannot be used for archaeology.
